class CfgWeapons {
    class Default {
        scope = 0;
        type = 0;
    };
    
    class Rifle : Default {
        scope = 0;
        type = 1;
        reloadTime = 0.1;
        magazineReloadTime = 3.0;
        autoFire = 0;
    };
    
    class SyntheticRifle : Rifle {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "SyntheticRifle";
        displayNameMagazine = "30Rnd STANAG";
        shortNameMagazine = "5.56mm";
        model = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticMagazine\SyntheticRifle.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticMagazine\equip_SyntheticRifle.paa";
        magazines[] = {"SyntheticMagazine"};
        reloadTime = 0.1;
        magazineReloadTime = 3.6;
        recoil = "SyntheticRifleRecoil";
        recoilProne = "SyntheticRifleRecoilProne";
        autoFire = 1;
        burst = 3;
        modes[] = {"Single", "Burst", "FullAuto"};
        class Single {
            displayName = "Semi";
            burst = 1;
            reloadTime = 0.1;
        };
        class Burst {
            displayName = "Burst";
            burst = 3;
            reloadTime = 0.1;
        };
        class FullAuto {
            displayName = "Full";
            burst = 20;
            reloadTime = 0.1;
            autoFire = 1;
        };
    };
    
    class SyntheticSupport : Rifle {
        scope = 2;
        displayName = "SyntheticSupport";
        displayNameMagazine = "100Rnd 7.62mm";
        model = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticSupport\SyntheticSupport.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticSupport\equip_SyntheticSupport.paa";
        magazines[] = {"SyntheticSupport"};
        reloadTime = 0.1;
        magazineReloadTime = 8.5;
        autoFire = 1;
        modes[] = {"FullAuto"};
    };
    
    class SyntheticLauncher : Default {
        scope = 2;
        type = 4;
        displayName = "Synthetic Launcher";
        model = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticRocket\SyntheticRocket.p3d";
        picture = "\Synthetic\weapons\SyntheticRocket\equip_SyntheticRocket.paa";
        magazines[] = {"SyntheticLauncher"};
        reloadTime = 0.1;
        magazineReloadTime = 1.0;
    };
    
    class Binocular : Default {
        scope = 2;
        type = 0;
        displayName = "Binoculars";
        model = "\Synthetic\weapons\binoculars.p3d";
    };
    
    class Throw : Default {
        scope = 2;
        type = 0;
        displayName = "Throw";
        magazines[] = {"HandGrenade"};
    };
    
    class Put : Default {
        scope = 2;
        type = 0;
        displayName = "Put";
        magazines[] = {"Mine", "PipeBomb"};
    };
};
